programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Face a newlywed duo’s droopy deck and a foundation crack their inspector missed.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Confront safety issues that a couple didn’t expect to find on their repair list.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Watch a single mom give her home inspector an F after leaks make life miserable.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Get hot under the collar as homeowners deal with an HVAC system gone haywire.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Get to the bottom of a stinky backup, a cheap fix, and multiple missed issues.

programme.desc: Feel the love as Mike helps a duped family get their house back by Christmas.
